home.flashSaleDesc: Up to 50% Off on Top Products

search.noResultsDesc: Try different keywords or adjust filters

cart.emptyDesc: Discover amazing products and add them to your cart
cart.title: My Cart

checkout.orderFailed: Failed to place order. Please try again.
checkout.sslFailed: SSLCommerz initiation failed. Please try another method.
checkout.cardNote: You'll enter your card details on the next screen — secured by Stripe.
checkout.sslNote: You'll be redirected to SSLCommerz's secure payment gateway.
checkout.bankNote: After placing the order, you'll be shown the merchant number and can submit your transaction ID for verification.

payment.title: Payment
payment.bkashInstructions: Open your bKash app → Send Money → Enter merchant number → Enter the exact amount → Use your Order Number as reference.
payment.nagadInstructions: Open your Nagad app → Send Money → Enter merchant number → Enter the exact amount → Use your Order Number as reference.
payment.bankInstructions: Transfer the exact amount using NPSB, RTGS, or BEFTN. Write your Order Number in the remarks/narration field.
payment.cardInstructions: Your payment is processed securely by Stripe. Card data never touches our servers.
payment.securedByStripe: Secured by Stripe · PCI DSS Level 1 certified
payment.errDuplicateTxId: This Transaction ID has already been used. Please enter a valid Transaction ID.
payment.submittedDesc: Payment submitted successfully! We'll verify and confirm your order shortly.
payment.stripeKeyMissing: Add VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to your .env to enable card payments.
payment.verificationNote: Payments are verified within 1–2 business hours. You'll receive a confirmation once verified.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.emptyDesc: Your orders will appear here once you make a purchase
orders.cancelConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The order will be marked as cancelled.

wishlist.title: My Wishlist
wishlist.emptyDesc: Save products you love for later

profile.title: My Profile
profile.signInToAccess: Sign in to access your account

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data, orders, and saved information will be permanently deleted.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help
contact.description: Our support team is available 7 days a week to assist you with any questions or concerns.
contact.whatsappDesc: Fastest response · Usually replies in minutes
contact.faq1Q: How do I track my order?
contact.faq1A: Go to Orders in the app to see real-time status updates for all your orders.
contact.faq2A: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for eligible items in original condition.
contact.faq3A: We deliver within {{days}} days. Express delivery options may be available at checkout.
contact.faq4A: Yes, Cash on Delivery (COD) is available for all orders within our delivery zones.
contact.faq5Q: How do I apply a coupon?
contact.faq5A: Enter your coupon code at the checkout page in the promo code field before placing the order.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.accountCreatedDesc: Your account is ready. You can now sign in.
auth.emailSentDesc: Check your inbox for password reset instructions.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email to receive reset instructions

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.cameraHint: Tap the camera icon to upload a photo
editProfile.passwordDesc: Enter your current password first, then choose a new one. Minimum 6 characters.
editProfile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

orderSuccess.codNote: Please have the exact amount ready when our delivery partner arrives.
orderSuccess.paymentVerificationDesc: Your payment details have been received. We'll verify and confirm your order within

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.heroDesc: Reach out through any channel below. Our support team is ready to assist you.
helpSupport.faq1A: Browse products from Home or Search, tap a product to view details, then tap "Add to Cart". Go to your Cart, review your items, and tap "Proceed to Checkout". Enter your delivery address, select a payment method, and confirm your order.
helpSupport.faq2A: Go to Profile > My Orders to see all your orders. Tap on any order to view its full timeline, including order confirmation, processing, shipping, and delivery status updates.
helpSupport.faq3A: Go to Profile > My Orders, tap on the order you want to cancel, and tap "Cancel Order". Orders can only be cancelled before they are shipped. Once shipped, please contact our helpline for assistance.
helpSupport.faq4A: We support multiple payment methods including bKash, Nagad, Rocket, SSLCommerz, Stripe (card payments), and Cash on Delivery (COD) in select areas. Available options are shown at checkout.
helpSupport.faq5A: For delivery-related issues, use the WhatsApp Helpline or Call Helpline buttons above. Our support team is available to help with delivery tracking, address changes, and rescheduling.

coupons.title: My Coupons
coupons.emptyDesc: Check back later for exclusive offers and discounts

transactions.title: Transaction History
transactions.emptyDesc: Your payment history will appear here
transactions.verificationNote: Manual payments (bKash, Nagad, Bank) are verified within 1–2 business hours during 10 AM – 8 PM.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1AccountDesc: Name, email address, phone number, and profile photo when you register.
privacy.section1OrderDesc: Delivery addresses, payment methods (tokenized), and purchase history.
privacy.section1DeviceDesc: Device type, OS version, app usage patterns, and crash reports to improve app performance.
privacy.section1LocationDesc: Only with your permission, to suggest relevant delivery options.
privacy.section2_1: • Process and fulfill your orders, including delivery and payment
privacy.section2_2: • Send order confirmations, updates, and important notices
privacy.section2_3: • Personalize your shopping experience and product recommendations
privacy.section2_4: • Improve our app, detect fraud, and ensure security
privacy.section2_5: • Send promotional offers (you can opt out at any time in Settings)
privacy.section3Desc: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with:
privacy.section3_1: • Delivery partners — only the information needed to complete your delivery
privacy.section3_2: • Payment processors — for secure transaction processing
privacy.section3_3: • Service providers — who assist in operating our platform under strict confidentiality
privacy.section3_4: • Legal requirements — when required by law or to protect rights and safety
privacy.section4Desc: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), hashed passwords, and access controls. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section5Desc: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Order records are retained for 7 years for legal and accounting purposes. You can request deletion of your account at any time from Settings.
privacy.section6Desc: You have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate information, request deletion of your account, opt out of marketing communications, and lodge a complaint with a data protection authority.
privacy.section7Desc: We use essential cookies for app functionality and analytics cookies (anonymized) to understand usage patterns. We do not use third-party advertising trackers.
privacy.section8Desc: Our service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.section9Desc: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via the app or email. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.section10Desc: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section2Desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update it as necessary. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.section3Desc: All orders are subject to product availability and confirmation of the order price. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders at any time, including after order confirmation, if we detect pricing errors, fraud, or insufficient stock.
terms.section3Payment: Payment must be made at the time of ordering (or upon delivery for COD orders). All prices are listed in Bangladeshi Taka (৳) and include applicable taxes.
terms.section4Estimate: Delivery times are estimates and may be affected by weather, holidays, or other factors beyond our control. Free delivery applies on orders above
terms.section5Desc: Please refer to our Refund Policy for detailed information about returns, exchanges, and refunds. In general, eligible items may be returned within 7 days of delivery in their original condition and packaging.
terms.section6Desc: You agree not to: use the service for any unlawful purpose, engage in fraudulent transactions, attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, resell products for commercial purposes without our consent, or post false, misleading, or defamatory reviews.
terms.section7Desc2: including logos, text, graphics, and software, is owned by or licensed to us. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.
terms.section8Desc: shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.section9Desc: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Bangladesh. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Dhaka, Bangladesh.
terms.section10Desc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via the app. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.section11Desc: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not, our straightforward return and refund policy is here to help.
refund.returnable2: Items that differ from product description
refund.returnable4: Unopened items in original packaging within 7 days
refund.notReturnable1: Used, opened, or damaged by customer
refund.notReturnable3: Intimate apparel and personal care items
refund.step1Desc: Reach us via WhatsApp or email within 7 days of delivery with your order number and reason.
refund.step2Desc: Our team reviews your request and sends return instructions within 24 hours.
refund.step3Desc: Pack the item securely and hand it to our delivery agent or ship to our address.
refund.step4Desc: Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund is processed within 3–5 business days.
refund.timeline1: Online payments (Card/bKash/Nagad): 3–5 business days to original payment method
refund.timeline2: Cash on Delivery (COD): Credited as store credit or bank transfer within 5–7 business days
refund.timeline3: Partial refunds: May apply for items with signs of use or missing accessories
refund.cancellationDesc: You may cancel an order free of charge before it is dispatched. Once dispatched, the order cannot be cancelled but may be returned after delivery.
refund.cancellationHowTo: To cancel, go to Orders in the app and tap Cancel Order, or contact our support team immediately.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
notFound.subDesc: Let's get you back on track.
